observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with foreign material
Visual pattern suggesting particle on surface
Localized deviation from normal pill appearance
mechanism_explanation: Contamination from external particles introduced during manufacturing or handling.
severity_visual_description: critical particle on surface visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Increase cleanroom filtration and add pre-process cleaning step.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the particle on surface would be absent and surface appears normal.
